================= REPORT SAVE =================

[CCSDS HEADER]
MsgId      : 0x0825
Seq        : 0xC000
Len        : 0x0215
TimeCode   : 00 0F 7E 33 6F D4
Padding    : 0x00000000

[REPORT BODY]
Reflected MID  : 0x1823
Reflected CC   : 0x02
RetType        : 0x00
RetCode        : 0
RetValSize     : 4

================= PARSED BY MID/CC =================
ReflectedMID : 0x1823
ReflectedCC  : 0x02
PayloadLen   : 4

[UNKNOWN MID] No parser for ReflectedMID=0x1823

[PAYLOAD HEX]
25 08 00 00 

[RETURN VALUE]
25 08 00 00 

[BINARY DATA]
